qa_pairs.question: What method can be used for transferring data with rsync or scp?
qa_pairs.answer: You can use a login node for transferring data via rsync or scp.

qa_pairs.question: What type of high-performance interconnect links all the nodes of the cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The InfiniBand NVIDIA NDR network links together all of the nodes of the cluster.

qa_pairs.question: How is each GPU connected to the InfiniBand network?
qa_pairs.answer: Each GPU is connected to a single NDR200 port through an NVIDIA ConnectX-7 HCA.

qa_pairs.question: How many NDR200 ports are on each GPU server that connect to the InfiniBand fabric?
qa_pairs.answer: Each GPU server has 4 or 8 NDR200 ports connected to the InfiniBand fabric.
